---
title: "Econ 103 Project 2"
author: "Mason Lee"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(Lahman)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
library(car)
```

```{r}
#data(package = "Lahman")

data(Pitching)

head(Pitching)

data(pitchingLabels)

pitchingLabels
```

```{r}
Pitching_full <- Pitching

Pitching_full <- Pitching_full %>% 
  filter(GS > 0, IPouts > 100) %>%
  mutate(SOrate = SO / IPouts, HRper9 = HR * 27 / IPouts, OutRate = BFP / IPouts)

tail(Pitching_full)
```

```{r}
#install.packages("Boruta")

library(Boruta)

#install.packages("ranger", dependencies = TRUE)

response_variable <- "W"

predictors <- setdiff(names(Pitching_full), response_variable)

boruta_formula <- as.formula(paste(response_variable, "~ ."))

boruta_result <- Boruta(boruta_formula, data = Pitching_full, doTrace = 2)

boruta_result

```
installed.packages()["ranger", ]
